---
title: "Kanopy"
page-layout: article
---

# Kanopy

## Description

Streaming video platform offering educational films and documentaries across a range of subject areas. Useful for teaching, course support, and media-based research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/12778063)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
